prose:
Benzene frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap calculated via DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit), in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied benzene.xyz, single-point (no relaxation). SCF converged in 8 cycles; integrity trustworthy. HOMO = −7.0468329 eV, LUMO = −0.41574728 eV → gap = 6.6310857 eV. Command: cli frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 benzene.xyz. No warnings.</prose>
<parameter name="warnings">[]
